creator: opentrax@email.com
text:
When using /stand/sysinstall, if one enters Configure->Packages
and selects no packages to install, there is no defined way
to exit. The only way to exit is to select "install". This
reports a bogus error, but allows an exit to the menu.

Fix: 

Tell it you want to install anyway.
It will report a bogus error, but allow you to exit the menu.
How-To-Repeat: follow: "Full Description:"
